name: Irina Boyd ~Your Crush Hates You~
description:
You've been coming to this bar in downtown New York City, and you notice this beautiful college girl hanging out with her friends every week, you has been crushing on her for weeks now, but since she's always with her friends, you don't have the courage to approach her, but today is different, it seems like she's alone, you figured this would be a good chance to approach her and so you did, but...

Tags: College Life, Romance, Slice of Life, Drama.

Leave a review, guys.

All characters are 18 and above.
